description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) in Arabic script. Involves two Jews, a man named [...] b. Ibrāhīm b. [...] b. Ibrāhīm b. ʿAllān, and a woman named Qurrat al-ʿAyn bt. ʿAllūn b. Musāfir b. Wahb (her grandfather Musāfir b. Wahb is known from many Geniza documents ca. 1100 CE). There seems to be a mutual release, but needs further examination for further details. Almost complete. On verso there is a Hebrew elegy.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
